creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to sasamotikomi from comment #0)
> Same WITH_NEW_MESA="YES" and without and with ="NO" (also correctly isn't
> possible to build 9.17 too?)

WITH_NEW_MESA isn't a user configurable knob on purpose, so setting it to whatever value doesn't change the selected version of Mesa.
